Distribution Revenue Management Digital Marketing Projects
Projects

Expert help for a single, focused goal.

Not every property needs ongoing support. Sometimes there's one important thing to get right, done properly, by a team that does it every day. Indi takes on standalone projects with a clear scope and a defined timeline, so you get expert delivery on the thing that matters most right now, with or without an ongoing partnership.

Start your free discovery
What we take on

A defined scope, delivered properly.

A new website and booking engine

A fast, beautiful site built to convert, with direct booking at its heart.

GDS activation

Open your property to corporate and travel-trade demand, set up and connected properly.

Direct-channel optimisation

Position your own website, phone and email as the best offer in the market, so more guests book with you directly.

PMS selection and setup

The right property management system for your property, implemented without the headaches.

Revenue management setup

Pricing structure, rate plans and tooling put in place to best practice.

Professional photography

Imagery that makes your property look as good as it is, and helps every channel perform.

Every project stands on its own. And when it's done, it's easy to keep the momentum going with ongoing support, entirely your call.

Start your free discovery

Have one project in mind?

Tell us what you need done. No cost, no commitment to talk it through.
